courses.name: Introduction to Computer Science and Programming
courses.syllabus: Basic syntax, expressions, conditional loops, lists, structures, recursion, pointer syntax, and file inputs/outputs in C++.

courses.name: Design and Analysis of Algorithms
courses.syllabus: Asymptotic complexity, sorting divide & conquer, greedy strategies, dynamic programming graphs, DFS/BFS, minimum spanning trees, and NP-completeness.

courses.name: Computer Networks
courses.syllabus: OSI & TCP/IP layers, routing algorithms (OSPF, BGP), TCP flow/congestion controls, socket programming, HTTP/DNS, and network security protocols.

courses.name: Engineering Graphics
courses.syllabus: Orthographic projections, isometric views, drafting machine parts, and introduction to computer-aided design tools (AutoCAD).

exams.location: Lecture Hall Complex (LHC) Hall A, IITR
Lecture Hall Complex (LHC) Hall B, IITR
